meaning: n.罗勒,罗勒属植物 Basil 巴兹尔(男子名)
examples: I like sandwiches a lot, and I'll add slices of fresh tomato, some fresh basil, spinach, sprouts, French mustard and so on.
Combine 1/4oz Grey Goose Vodka, 3/4 oz Monin Passion Fruit Syrup, 1 Fresh Strawberry cut in four and 2 Fresh Basil leaves into an iced cocktail shaker.
It was Basil who thought of it first.
It was adapted for the cinema in a 1949 Ealing comedy starring Basil Radford.
Another recently departed film composer, Basil Poledouris, is also high on my playlist.
